Package org.eventb.core.tool

Interface IState

All Known Subinterfaces:
IAbstractEventActionTable, IAbstractEventGuardList, IAbstractEventGuardTable, IAbstractEventInfo, IAbstractEventTable, IAbstractMachineInfo, IAccuracyInfo, IConcreteEventActionTable, IConcreteEventGuardTable, IConcreteEventInfo, IConcreteEventTable, IContextAccuracyInfo, IContextAxiomTable, IContextHypothesisManager, IContextLabelSymbolTable, IContextPointerArray, IContextTable, IConvergenceInfo, IEventActionTable, IEventHypothesisManager, IEventLabelSymbolTable, IEventWitnessTable, IHypothesisManager, IIdentifierSymbolTable, ILabelSymbolTable, IMachineAccuracyInfo, IMachineHypothesisManager, IMachineInfo, IMachineInvariantTable, IMachineLabelSymbolTable, IMachineVariableTable, IMachineVariantInfo, IParsedFormula, IPOGState, IPredicateTable<PE>, IReservedNameTable, ISCState, IVariantInfo, IVariantPresentInfo, IVariantUsedInfo
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractEventActionTable, AbstractEventGuardList, AbstractEventGuardTable, AbstractEventInfo, AbstractEventTable, AbstractMachineInfo, AccuracyInfo, ConcreteEventActionTable, ConcreteEventGuardTable, ConcreteEventInfo, ConcreteEventTable, ContextAccuracyInfo, ContextAxiomTable, ContextHypothesisManager, ContextLabelSymbolTable, ContextPointerArray, ContextTable, ConvergenceInfo, EventActionTable, EventGuardTable, EventHypothesisManager, EventLabelSymbolTable, EventWitnessTable, HypothesisManager, IdentifierSymbolTable, LabelSymbolTable, MachineAccuracyInfo, MachineHypothesisManager, MachineInfo, MachineInvariantTable, MachineLabelSymbolTable, MachineVariableTable, MachineVariantInfo, ParsedFormula, PredicateTable, ReservedNameTable, StackedIdentifierSymbolTable, State, SymbolTable, VariantPresentInfo, VariantUsedInfo
public interface IState
Common protocol for states store in a state repository (IStateRepository). To extend the state space of a core tool, i.e. static checker or proof obligation generator, a corresponding state, ISCState or IPOGState must be implemented.

A stub for an implementation of a state access protocol is offered.

A complex state built non-atomically should make use of it. As long as the state is being computed it should be mutable. Once the computation has finished the state should be made immutable. An attempt to invoke a method that would change a state that is immutable should throw a CoreException. An attempt to invoke a method that relies on the computation being terminated on a mutable state should throw a CoreException too.

A state can only be set from mutable to immutable.

Since:
3.0
See Also:

  • IPOGState
